# Campus Connect — VTU Student Platform

## 🚀 Quick Deploy to Render

1. Push this repo to GitHub
2. Go to [render.com](https://render.com) → New → Blueprint
3. Connect your GitHub repo — Render reads `render.yaml` automatically
4. Add optional env vars in Render dashboard (see below)
5. Deploy — takes ~5 minutes

## 🔑 Environment Variables

### Required (auto-generated by Render)
- `DATABASE_URL` — PostgreSQL connection (from Render DB)
- `JWT_SECRET` — Auto-generated secure key

### Optional (fill for full features)
| Variable | Where to get | What it enables |
|---|---|---|
| `EMAIL_USER` / `EMAIL_PASS` | Gmail App Password | OTP verification, password reset |
| `RAZORPAY_KEY_ID` / `RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET` | [razorpay.com](https://razorpay.com) | Premium subscription payments |
| `JUDGE0_RAPIDAPI_KEY` | [rapidapi.com/judge0](https://rapidapi.com/judge0-official/api/judge0-ce) | Real code execution on coding platform |
| `CLOUDINARY_URL` etc. | [cloudinary.com](https://cloudinary.com) | Persistent profile photo storage |

## 🏠 Local Development

```bash
# 1. Setup PostgreSQL and create database
createdb CampusConnect

# 2. Backend
cd backend
cp .env.example .env      # Fill in your values
npm install
node app.js               # Auto-runs migrations on first start

# 3. Frontend (new terminal)
cd frontend
npm install --legacy-peer-deps
npm start                 # Runs on http://localhost:3000
```

## 📁 Project Structure

```
campus-connect/
├── backend/
│   ├── routes/           # 12 route files
│   │   ├── userRoutes.js       # Auth, profile, marks, notifications
│   │   ├── adminRoutes.js      # Full admin panel API
│   │   ├── codingRoutes.js     # LeetCode-style coding platform
│   │   ├── forumRoutes.js      # Peer doubt Q&A forum
│   │   ├── paymentRoutes.js    # Razorpay subscription payments
│   │   ├── leaderboardRoutes.js # Scoring + rankings
│   │   ├── flashcardRoutes.js  # SM-2 spaced repetition
│   │   ├── newsRoutes.js       # VTU news feed
│   │   └── ...
│   ├── middleware/
│   │   ├── authMiddleware.js   # JWT + blocked user check
│   │   ├── adminMiddleware.js  # Role-based access
│   │   └── validate.js         # Input validation rules
│   ├── database/
│   │   ├── init.sql            # Full schema (auto-runs on start)
│   │   ├── migration_v2.sql    # V2 additions (forum, payments, etc.)
│   │   └── seed_coding.js      # Seeds 6 coding problems
│   └── app.js                  # Express server, all routes registered
├── frontend/
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/         # 90+ React components
│   │   │   ├── CodingPlatform.js  # Full LeetCode-style editor
│   │   │   ├── PeerForum.js       # Q&A forum with voting
│   │   │   ├── Leaderboard.js     # Rankings with podium
│   │   │   ├── PremiumUpgrade.js  # Razorpay payment flow
│   │   │   ├── Flashcards.js      # SM-2 study cards
│   │   │   ├── VTUResources.js    # 2022+2025 scheme resources
│   │   │   ├── VTUNews.js         # VTU alerts feed
│   │   │   ├── CertificatePage.js # PDF download + QR verify
│   │   │   ├── ResumeBuilder.js   # PDF export resume
│   │   │   └── ...
│   │   └── admin/              # 16 admin panel components
│   └── public/
│       ├── sw.js               # Service worker (PWA + push notifs)
│       └── manifest.json       # PWA manifest
└── render.yaml                 # One-click Render deployment
```

## ✨ Features

### Academic
- SGPA/CGPA calculator from PDF upload
- Subject-wise analytics + grade charts
- CGPA tracker with semester history
- Backlog dashboard + clearing courses
- Rank predictor vs class percentile
- Bulk marks upload (CSV/manual)

### Learning
- VTU Resources (2015/2018/2021/2022/2025 schemes)
- Training courses with certificates
- LeetCode-style coding platform (Python/Java/C/C#)
- Mock tests + aptitude practice
- Peer doubt forum with reputation system
- AI flashcards with spaced repetition
- Community notes with ratings

### Career
- Placement drives with eligibility checker
- Resume builder with PDF export (exact template)
- Alumni mentorship connections
- Job opportunities board
- Internship tracker
- College leaderboard

### Productivity
- Attendance tracker (85% warning)
- Exam timetable + reminders
- Study planner
- Reminders system

### Platform
- VTU news & exam alerts feed
- Admin panel with 16 management screens
- Push notifications (PWA)
- Dark mode
- Global search
- Certificate download with QR verification

### Monetization
- Premium subscription (₹199/month, ₹1499/year) via Razorpay
- Feature gating (free: 5 AI queries/day; premium: unlimited)
- College subscription model (add COLLEGE_ADMIN role)
- Placement referral tracking

## 🔒 Security
- JWT authentication with blocked-user check on every request
- Input validation on all POST/PUT endpoints (express-validator)
- Rate limiting (auth: 15/15min, API: 300/15min)
- Helmet security headers
- Role-based access control (user/admin)
- SQL injection prevention (parameterized queries throughout)
- Graceful error handling (no stack traces in production)

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: React 18, MUI v5, Chart.js, Socket.io-client
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL (pg), JWT
- **Storage**: Cloudinary (optional, falls back to disk)
- **Payments**: Razorpay (optional)
- **Code Execution**: Judge0 CE via RapidAPI (optional)
- **Email**: Nodemailer + Gmail SMTP
- **Deployment**: Render (web service + PostgreSQL)
